name: YOUTON: OU NO ME (DEMONIC RELEASE: EYE OF THE EMPEROR)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 6

Chakra Cost: 8

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 6

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, E, P

This technique was founded on using the pain of a serious injury (the loss of an eye, or something roughly comparable) to call forth inner demonic essence. If you have never suffered similar pain or injury, you cannot use this technique (GM's discretion). You use your Chakra to amplify the power of the demonic essence exponentially, causing severe, nerve wracking pain. The target takes 4d8 negative energy damage and must make a save to avoid becoming @Condition[stunned]{stunned} for 1d4 rounds. If the damage kills a creature, their body will wither (as though mummified).

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d8, up to 1d8 per level or 12d8, whichever is lower. Each additional damage die will cause you to take 1d4 damage, and you must make a Fortitude save (DC 18) to avoid becoming @Condition[fatigued]{fatigued}. This DC increases by 2 each time you empower this technique, until you get an evening of rest (at least 8 hours).
